Diagnose system
HomeSolutionsServicesPartnersInsightsAboutContactDiagnose system

Process

A structured approach from diagnosis to scale

The system is built in phases to avoid automating badly defined problems.

Start diagnosis Solutions
Data modelclean
Pipelinevisible
Automationcontrolled

Diagnosis

Diagnose

We map the current system: CRM data, lifecycle stages, lead sources, workflows, outbound process, dashboards and handoffs.

  • Audit the CRM
  • Review data quality
  • Map handoffs
  • Identify reporting gaps

Architecture

Design

We define the target operating architecture before changing tools.

  • Data model
  • Pipeline logic
  • Automation plan
  • Reporting model
  • Acquisition paths

System

Implement

We configure the system in the tools the team uses, with documentation and clean handover.

  • HubSpot setup
  • Workflow build
  • Data cleanup
  • Dashboard setup
  • Form and tracking hooks

Measurement

Optimize

We improve the system from evidence: conversion, velocity, quality and usage.

  • Review performance
  • Remove friction
  • Refine automation
  • Improve reporting

Process

Timeline

The right timeline depends on the current mess and the number of systems involved, but the process stays controlled.

  1. Week 1: diagnosis
  2. Weeks 2-3: architecture
  3. Weeks 4-6: implementation
  4. Ongoing: optimization

Rotata

Start diagnosis

Diagnose system

The system behind B2B growth.
